article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: The summary largely maintains neutral, attributed language and avoids the article’s emotive rhetoric. It frames most statements as the author’s perspective and notes the piece is an open letter. However, a few key claims are presented without clear attribution (e.g., “widespread public support,” “use of civilians as shields,” and generalized suppression outcomes), which partially adopts the source’s framing as fact.

custom_reasoning.spin: Verbs like “describes,” “expresses,” and “urges” are neutral; no emotive verbs from the source were mirrored.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Claims such as “widespread public support” and “use of civilians as shields” are stated without explicit attribution to the author.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: The summary states mass arrests/executions and civilian-shield use in its own voice rather than as the author’s claims.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone remains measured; avoids replicating hyperbolic terms like “terrorist” or “Hitler.”
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks by the model; derogatory labels from the source were not adopted.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No assertions about internal motives or thoughts beyond what the letter states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Focus aligns with the single-perspective nature of the open letter, with some context about attribution; minimal imbalance.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures the main perspectives present (author’s, references to U.S./opposition); no major omissions.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Limited use of evaluative adjectives; mostly descriptive and restrained.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Generally neutral; “regime” and “propaganda” appear but are common descriptors in this context.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Does not amplify negative elements beyond what the source emphasizes.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No deference to elites or dismissal of grassroots; treats sources descriptively.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Noticeably more neutral than the source; a few un-attributed claims prevent a perfect score.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Reflects the author’s perspective and referenced figures (Trump, Reza Pahlavi); proportional to the source content.
